droppedOffThesis.name: Heatronics
droppedOffThesis.reason: Heat therapy medical device hardware (Rs 1.8 Cr seed, Jul 2 2026, IPV lead). IPV is watchlist fund but hardware product = off-thesis. Physical product, ISO 13485 certified medical device.

droppedOffThesis.name: Uni Seoul
droppedOffThesis.reason: Korean-inspired consumer lifestyle/retail brand (Rs 35 Cr Series A, Sauce.vc lead, Jun 2026). Sauce.vc is watchlist fund but: (1) Series A pricing — off-thesis stage, (2) offline retail-first model, limited software wedge.

droppedOffThesis.name: Econovus Packaging
droppedOffThesis.reason: Sustainable packaging startup (Rs 40 Cr pre-Series A, Rainmatter lead, Jul 7 2026). Rainmatter is watchlist fund but non-software B2B = off-thesis. Dropped (confirmed from prior scan).

priorWindowRadar.name: Rovia
priorWindowRadar.note: Wealthtech ($1M pre-seed, Antler India lead, June 1 2026). Ex-Zolve + ex-Vance founders. Still not in tracker. Antler India watchlist hit. Relevance Medium-High. Consider adding to tracker.

priorWindowRadar.name: SwishX
priorWindowRadar.note: Pharma/MedTech AI ($2.2M seed, Blume Ventures lead, May 2026). Ex-Google + Amazon founders. Outside window but Blume watchlist. Consider adding to tracker.

priorWindowRadar.name: Arrowhead
priorWindowRadar.note: Voice AI startup, Bengaluru, $3M seed (Jan 2026). Backed by Stellaris Venture Partners and Kunal Shah (Sparrow watchlist i01). Currently outside the 7-day window but not yet tracked. Kunal Shah (watchlist) on cap table = warm path. Voice AI is applied AI — in-thesis. Likely approaching Series A in 2026H2. Action: Add to tracker as Medium-High watch item. Warm path: Kunal Shah → founders.

stealthHiringSignals.name: Fermi.ai
stealthHiringSignals.description: AI-first STEM EdTech (grades 8–12 math/physics/chemistry), launched Jan 2026, 10-person team in Bengaluru. Co-founded by Mukesh Bansal (Sparrow watchlist i19, co-founder Myntra/Cult.fit) and Peeyush Ranjan (ex-Flipkart CTO, ex-Google VP/GM). Backed only by Meraki Labs (founders' own fund). Hiring 'Junior Full Stack Founding Engineer' in HSR, Bengaluru — 5-day on-site, immediate joiners. Pre-raise signal: external funding 3–9 months out.
stealthHiringSignals.geography: Singapore HQ / Bengaluru team — India market focus
stealthHiringSignals.action: Added to tracker as c052. Direct outreach to Mukesh Bansal — he is both watchlist angel (i19) AND founder. Warm path is direct.

stealthHiringSignals.name: Oodle AI
stealthHiringSignals.description: B2B observability platform (logs/metrics/traces), Bengaluru team. IIT alumni founders, ex-Rubrik, ex-AWS. Raised $5.5M from Pear VC. Two Founding Engineer roles (Distributed Systems + Frontend) in Bengaluru — both still open from prior scan.
stealthHiringSignals.geography: San Jose HQ / Bengaluru team — borderline India-first
stealthHiringSignals.action: Monitor only — not India-first HQ, no watchlist investor. Status unchanged from prior scan.

stealthHiringSignals.name: zaimler
stealthHiringSignals.description: Enterprise AI semantic knowledge platform — links fragmented enterprise data with knowledge-distilled models. Team ex-LinkedIn/Visa/Meta/Branch. Fortune 500 design partners. Hiring 'Founding Cloud Infrastructure Engineer' in Bangalore.
stealthHiringSignals.action: Monitor only — US-first company with Bangalore ops, not India-HQ'd. Not a thesis fit as sourced.

note: Second scan run Jul 8 2026 (same calendar date as prior scan, rotated to under-covered angles). 32 distinct queries across sector (5), source (7), investor-watchlist (7), regional (2), accelerator (2), and stealth-hiring (8) angles. Key rotation: ran 6 additional ATS sites for stealth/hiring beyond prior scan's 2 (now: Greenhouse, Lever, SmartRecruiters, Workable, Ashby, BambooHR, Wellfound, Cutshort), added VCCircle and ET/Mint source angle, extended regional to Hyderabad/Chennai/Pune. Primary find: Fermi.ai (c052) — AI-first EdTech, pre-funding stealth, Mukesh Bansal (watchlist i19 = the FOUNDER) + ex-Flipkart CTO Peeyush Ranjan. Founding engineer hire in Bengaluru = pre-raise signal. Highest-pedigree find to date. Watchlist fund hits (Rainmatter, IPV, Sauce.vc) all landed on off-thesis companies this week. Prior-window radar: Arrowhead (voice AI, Kunal Shah watchlist, $3M seed Jan 2026, not yet tracked) flagged for next action.
